name: Guacamole (Crocker)
recipeIngredient: 2 Ripe avocados, peeled and cut up
1 Or 2 green chili peppers, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the avocados, onion, chili peppers, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and ascorbic acid mixture until creamy.
2. Stir in the tomato.
3. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
4. Serve with corn chips.
About: This recipe makes approximately 2 cups of dip, with each tablespoon containing about 25 calories.
